diagrams.title: End-to-End Speech Recognition Pipeline
diagrams.description: A flow diagram showing the complete pipeline from raw audio input to transcribed text output, including preprocessing, feature extraction, encoding, and decoding stages.
diagrams.purpose: Illustrates the complete deep learning pipeline for converting speech to text, helping learners understand how audio waves are transformed into meaningful text through neural networks.

diagrams.title: Mel Spectrogram Feature Extraction
diagrams.description: A diagram showing how raw audio waveforms are converted into Mel spectrograms - 2D representations that capture frequency information over time using mel-scale filtering.
diagrams.purpose: Explains the crucial preprocessing step that converts continuous audio signals into the 2D feature representations that deep learning models can process effectively.

diagrams.title: Sequence-to-Sequence Attention Model for Speech
diagrams.description: Architecture diagram showing an encoder-decoder model with attention mechanism, where the encoder processes audio features and the decoder generates text tokens using attention to focus on relevant audio segments.
diagrams.purpose: Demonstrates how modern speech recognition models use attention mechanisms to align audio frames with output text, which is fundamental to state-of-the-art systems like Whisper and RNN-T.
